heading: Our Medical Experts are here for you.

Get Quality Medical Care and Treatment with Us. Book Appointment View Department Find A Doctor Book Appointment Health Package Patient Care Second Opinion Expert Doctors Our Expert doctors are the backbone of our commitment to world-class healthcare. With decades of combined experience, advanced training from top medical institutions, and a passion for patient care. Read More 24 X 7 hrs. Service At DHLI , your health is our priority — anytime, day or night. Our hospital operates 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, providing round-the-clock medical services to ensure you're never alone in the time of need. Read   More Online Appointment Skip the waiting lines and schedule your consultation with ease! Our Online Appointment System allows you to connect with our doctors and specialists at your convenience. Read   More Welcome to Delhi Heart & Lung Institute Quality Healthcare at Affordable Cost. Delhi Heart & Lung Institiute, (A unit of Apex Heart Care Pvt. Ltd.) is a 100 bedded NABH and NABL Accredited Hospital located in the heart of the city since 2003. Hospital is centrally air conditioned and offers state-of-the-art facilities in india. Cardiology – Both Invasive & Non - Invasive Cardio – Thoracic & Vascular Surgery (CTVS) Pulmonology, Critical Care & Sleep Medicine Oncology – Medical & Surgical Nephrology Know More Our Services We are dedicated to delivering comprehensive, world-class healthcare services under one roof. As a Super Specialty Hospital, we integrate cutting-edge technology, highly skilled medical professionals, and personalized care to ensure every patient receives the highest standard of treatment. Emergency Care 24×7 Casualty and Emergency Department which  is fully equipped to handle all types of medical emergencies with speed, skill, and compassion. Know More OPD Services Out-Patient Department (OPD) serves as the first point of contact between patients and our team of highly qualified specialists. Know More Non-Invasive Lab Non-Invasive Laboratory offers a comprehensive range of advanced diagnostic tests that help evaluate heart and other vital organ functions. Know More Laboratory The Laboratory Department provides comprehensive diagnostic services to support accurate and timely medical decision-making. Know More Radiology The Department provides advanced diagnostic services that support precise disease detection and guide optimal treatment strategies. Know More Physiotherapy Department at DHLI supports patients in improving mobility, rebuilding strength, reducing pain, and restoring overall functional abilities. Know More About Delhi Heart & Lung Institute Delhi Heart & Lung Institute (A Unit of Apex Heart Care Pvt. Ltd.) is a 100-bedded, NABH and NABL accredited hospital located in the heart of the city since 2003. Fully air-conditioned and equipped with cutting-edge technology, the hospital offers world-class care in Cardiology, Cardiothoracic Surgery, Pulmonology, Oncology, and many other specialties. Our expert medical teams are committed to delivering personalized treatment and the highest standards of healthcare under one roof. Know More Patients Treated 0 Lakhs + Beds 95 Doctors 115 + Specialities 10 + Heart Surgeries 22990 + Cardiac Procedure 1 Lakhs + Dialysis Procedures 45 k + Oncology Treatment 15 K + Centers of Excellence What’s New at Dhli Know More Know More Know More Know More Highlight Happy Patients Dr K.K Sethi and his team has been a blessing for my father for more than last 10 years .He has always been there with the best diagnosis and treatment. He has always guided us the best preventive measure for his health.Whole team at Dhli is caring and are our toes for helping . Divya Malik Patient's Attendant A very neat and clean hospital(OPD) takes care of its patients out of the way. Very courteous  and respectful behavior has always been extended. Delhi heart and Lung Institute is a very good hospital. A lightly professional organization while takes care of its patients out of way. Doctor is very co-operative and listens to the details of patient with full attention. Everything is excellent, good food, good nursing  etc. Sushil kaur Patient My father, Mr. Narinder Pal Joshi, was recently admitted to the hospital, where he received outstanding treatment from a team of specialist doctors. The hospital maintained a high standard of hygiene. I would like to express my gratitude, especially to Dr. Kabir Sethi, for his excellent advice and treatment throughout my father's stay. Vaibhav Joshi Visitor I Had the honour of undergoing my mandatory health check-up at the Delhi Heart & Lung Institute as a selected Yatri for the Kailash Mansarovar Yatra via Nathu La. From registration to the various tests, the process was seamless and efficient, guided by a team of compassionate and dedicated doctors and staff.

A special mention to the kind and soft-spoken Director, Dr. Neelam Sethi, whose graciousness made a lasting impression. Most touching was the selfless dedication of Ms. Neha Bist, who coordinated the entire medical check-up and meals for all 48 Yatris, taking her own lunch only after everyone else had been served. Witnessing such kindness gave me goosebumps. Bapi Kailash Mansarover Yatri My experience at DHLI Hospital was very comforting and reassuring. My grandmother was admitted there, and throughout her stay, the entire staff was incredibly supportive and caring, I’m truly grateful for the compassion shown by everyone at DHLI. Varun Patient's Attendant My experience at DHLI Hospital was very comforting and reassuring. My mom was admitted there, and throughout her stay, the entire staff was incredibly supportive and caring. The doctors were not only skilled but also very kind and patient in explaining everything to us. The nurses and support staff made sure my mom was comfortable and well looked after. I’m truly grateful for the compassion and professionalism shown by everyone at DHLI. Gunjan Rai Patient's Attendant "I recently visited Delhi Heart and Lungs Institute for my mother's surgery and was thoroughly impressed with the exceptional care and service provided by the entire team. From the front desk to the nursing staff, housekeeping, and caretaking staff, everyone was professional, courteous, and compassionate.

The facilities were modern, clean, and well-maintained. The doctors were highly skilled and took the time to explain everything clearly. The nursing staff were attentive, caring, and went above and beyond to ensure our comfort and well-being.

I would highly recommend Delhi Heart and Lungs Institute to anyone seeking medical care. Their commitment to excellence and patient satisfaction is truly commendable. Thank you to the entire team for your dedication and hard work!" Ashishkumar S Mishra Patient's Attendant The practice is excellent. Staff and doctors always go above and beyond. The service is second to none. Always polite courteous and efficient. My father had gone through CABG and the treatment he had recently received from the practice is good..Special thanks to Dr Ashok Gupta sir and his team… Suman Vatts Patient's Attendant It is great experience to consult Dr Ashok K Gupta, and all the CTVS team and coordinator also very friendly & compassionate doctor. Took all the time to go over my question. My grandmother left the hospital feeling much better thank you doctor and all the staff of dhli hospital Mohd Anwar Patient's Attendant Great experience with hospital, polite , friendly, extremely helpful and professional staff. Extremely good doctors and support .Visiting hospital for last 7 years and thank you for hospital and staff especially Dr Uma and team for taking good care of my patient. Ritu saini Patient's Attendant Best hospital for heart surgeries in central delhi , very polite and friendly staff. honey Patient's Attendant I have taken session in physiotherapy department in DHLI.. I am fully satisfied with the treatment. I got relieved in cervical spondylosis and the behaviour of the doctor's is excellent. I have consultated with Dr Aayushi sharma. Gracy Abraham Patient Visited for medical test in connection with my kmy. Good hospital and nice facilities. Haridasan K R Kailash Mansarovar Yatri Dear Patients, I have taken the treatment for my wife (Mrs. Neeru Bala) in Physiotherapy Department. There, We met with Dr. Aayushi Sharma (Physiotherapist). She treated my wife with utmost care and attention. She skillfully treated the problem of Backache in Lumbar Region of Spine. Earlier we have visited many Physiotherapists but all our efforts went in vain. It is only due to Dr. Aayushi, that my wife got best treatment and finally got rid of her Spine issue.
Hats off to Dr. Aayushi for her services and of course for providing best ever treatment...... Ankush Garg Patient's Attendent All the staff members are very polite and maintain excellent coordination while interacting with patients in a gentle and respectful manner. Narender kumar Patient It was good behavior of doctors and staffs. And all of staffs who worked here.
Thanks for your support and care. Amrita Pandey Patient Dr kabir sethi is a fantastic dr . He explains and listens to the patients. He is god for us. Best dr . Smriti Sood Patient Doctors are master of their field. Other staff is very co-operative with good behavior. Cleanliness is well maintained. Pawan Sharma Patient Dr.T C Singh is treating my father Mr Jai prakash Gaur who suffered from heart issues from last 12 years, he is not only a fantastic doctor but a kind hearted human .He always shows concern about his patients.
Excellent Doctor. Based on the symptoms discussed during the consultation process, he suggests for tests, if required. He prescribes medicine along with important suggestions for overall improvement of the medical condition. He is an experienced Doctor and gives sufficient time to attend to every patient thoroughly. Thanks Shalini Bhardwaj Visitor My name is Sunita. I am undergoing physiotherapy at Delhi Heart Hospital. I am getting a lot of relief. I would like to thank Dr. Aayushi who did my therapy and cured me. And I would also like to thank other physiotherapists. Sunita krii Patient Dr. K k sethi we happy very good dr. Good behaviour good explaining we are happy and satisfied with. Dr. Anuj Chachan Patient Excellent service with positive attitude Very nice friendly behaviour nursing staff thanks to all Sunil Kumar Patient I Recently visited Delhi Heart and Lungs Institute for my father surgery . I’m very happy with entire Hospital . Thanku delhi heart faculties . Include with nurse , cleaning staff etc ..
Dr Pushpinder Khurana very good . After operation he say to me your father strong . Don’t worry kid chill . U can take him today. Thanku so much Doctor.
I would highly recommend Delhi Heart and Lungs Institute to anyone seeking medical care.---------- Gnain Production Patient Very excellent services and hospitality all the doctors are very calm and professional. Bhavya Vashist Patient International Patient Care Our International Patient Coordination Team is here to assist you at every step on the way — from your first inquiry to your return home after treatment. Whether you need medical advice, visa support, or help planning your stay, our representatives are ready to guide you. How We Can Help Provide detailed treatment information and cost estimates Assist with visa invitation letters and travel arrangements Coordinate appointments and online consultations Offer post-treatment follow-up and recovery guidance Get in Touch Our international representatives are available 24/7 to respond to your queries.
